transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: It recasts pleasure and relief as products of a recurring craving loop, then adds biological and social-conditioning accounts; sweeping causal claims and strained analogies weaken credibility.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It makes the same advance from craving-based relief through natural-appetite claims to learned preferences and failed restriction; the argument progresses, but repetition and overstatement limit movement.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Matching causal reframing, experiential prompts, and freedom-oriented contrasts should produce equivalent belief movement when presented in the same sequence.
